---
title: "Methods in Economic History — Slides"
---

| Week | Topic |
|------|-------|
| [Week 1](01_slides.html) | Introduction |
| [Week 2](02_slides.html) | Reasoning about a quantitative world |
| [Week 3](03_slides.html) | Basic tools: central tendencies and dispersion |
| [Week 4](04_slides.html) | Selection bias |
| [Week 5](05_slides.html) | Linear Regression |
| [Week 6](06_slides.html) | Rival Models: Empire and Historical Bond Yields |
| [Week 7](07_slides.html) | Measuring the Standard of Living: Real Wages |
| [Week 8](08_slides.html) | Measuring GDP |
| [Week 9](09_slides.html) | Measurement Error |
